author: nflaig
content: did you read the PR description? I added context there and also linked all previous PRs

author: nflaig
content: but essentially we wanna set this as low as possible so that builders are less concerned about having their capital locked for long time

author: tersec
content: ok, not convinced a bunch of builders who need to randomly exit/reenter the network and can't afford 2 ETH makes sense but sure

author: nflaig
content: it's mostly about the exiting part, eg. you might submit a large amount of ETH during high volatility to be able to bid, but you wanna get that money back fast once it's no longer needed and having it locked almost a month is not great

author: nflaig
content: it's not a gonna be a huge factor but it makes using trustless payments more likely if you can compete with larger bids

author: nflaig
content: in principle, we should also set `MIN_BUILDER_WITHDRAWABILITY_DELAY` as low as possible if there isn't a technical or security reason to have it higher
